title: Slow-cooker lamb rogan josh
subtitle: Kashmiri-style lamb curry with tomatoes and warm spices
excerpt: Diced lamb shoulder braised in a spiced tomato sauce with cumin, coriander, garam masala, and chilli for six to eight hours. The slow cooker builds the sauce more slowly than a stovetop version, producing a deeper, rounded curry. Serve with basmati rice.
sourceNotes: Rogan josh is a Kashmiri lamb curry that arrived in British restaurants through the Bangladeshi and Punjabi communities from the 1960s onwards. The name means roughly 'red', from the Kashmiri red chillies traditionally used. The British curry house version uses tomatoes and standard spices rather than dried Kashmiri chillies — this is the version British home cooks recognise. The slow cooker suits the dish: long, low heat is closer to the slow simmering traditional method than a 20-minute pan curry.

recipe.freezeNotes: Freezes well for up to 3 months.
recipe.batchNotes: Double the recipe and freeze in portions. The flavour improves after freezing and reheating.

content.text: Bloom the spices in oil before adding the other ingredients. Cumin, coriander, and garam masala need a minute of heat in fat to release their flavour compounds. Adding them raw to the slow cooker with the liquid produces a flat curry — the blooming step makes the difference.

Heat the {{vegetable-oil}} in a wide pan over medium-high heat. Fry the {{onion}} for 5 minutes until softened. Add the {{garlic}} and {{ginger-root}} and cook for 1 minute. Add the {{cumin-ground}}, {{coriander-ground}}, {{smoked-paprika}}, {{chilli-powder}}, and {{tomato-puree}} and stir for 1 minute until the spices are fragrant. Transfer to the slow cooker. Add the {{lamb-shoulder}}, {{tinned-tomatoes}}, and {{sea-salt-fine}}. Stir to combine. Cook on low for 6 to 8 hours, until the lamb is completely tender. Switch off, wait 2 minutes, then stir through the {{plain-yoghurt}} and {{garam-masala}}. Taste and adjust seasoning.

items.symptom: Yoghurt has curdled in the sauce
items.cause: Added while the pot was still very hot
items.fix: Switch off the slow cooker and wait 3 to 4 minutes before stirring in the yoghurt. Full-fat plain yoghurt is more stable than low-fat

items.cause: Spices not bloomed before slow cooking
items.fix: Always fry the spices with the onion and oil before adding them. This step cannot be done in the slow cooker itself

items.cause: Tinned tomatoes released a lot of water
items.fix: Remove the lid and cook on high for 20 to 30 minutes at the end to reduce. Alternatively, stir in 1 tablespoon of tomato puree

content.text: Rogan josh is one of the most ordered dishes in British curry houses and one of the most cooked at home. The slow cooker version produces a sauce with more body than a quick pan version because the lamb renders fat into the sauce over six hours. Serve with basmati rice and naan, and spoon mango chutney and yoghurt alongside.
